title: CIDC_S16_NMR_Celegans_Extraction_Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4hqmu","text":"A sample preparation protocol for lyophilized C. elegans samples to be analyzed by NMR spectroscopy","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Remove lyophilized C. elegans samples from -80 °C freezer
Add approximately 200 µL of 1.0 mm Zirconia beads (BioSpec Cat. No. 11079110zx) to each sample.

FastPrep-96 (High-throughput bead beating grinder and lysis system, MP Biomedicals, 116010500) QuickFlex™ Sample Holder (Adapter for 96 x 2 mL tube holder on FastPrep-96, MP Biomedicals, 116010570) Using a FastPrep-96™ instrument (MP Biomedicals) equipped with QuickFlex™ Sample Holder (or similar equipment) homogenize samples at 420 rcf, °C, for 00:01:30
Place samples on dry ice for 00:01:30 to avoid overheating due and sample degradation.
Using a FastPrep-96™ instrument (MP Biomedicals) equipped with QuickFlex™ Sample Holder (or similar equipment) homogenize samples at 420 rcf, °C, for 00:01:30
Place samples on dry ice for 00:01:30 to avoid overheating due and sample degradation.
Using a FastPrep-96™ instrument (MP Biomedicals) equipped with QuickFlex™ Sample Holder (or similar equipment) homogenize samples at 420 rcf, °C, for 00:01:30
Store on dry ice and proceed with Extraction (Section 2) or store at -80 °C until ready to 00:00:00 process.
Add 500 µL of 100% IPA chilled to -20 °C to each homogenized sample containing: (1) lyophilized C. elegans material and (2) zirconia beads
Vortex each sample for 00:00:30 to 00:01:00
Let sample sit at Room temperature for 00:15:00 to 00:20:00
Add an additional 500 µL of 100% IPA chilled to -20 °C to each homogenized sample containing: (1) lyophilized C. elegans material, (2) zirconia beads, and (3) 500 µL IPA.
Vortex each sample for 00:00:30 to 00:01:00
Let sample sit at Room temperature for 00:15:00 to 00:20:00
Store samples Overnight (~12 hours) at -20 °C
Centrifuge samples for 00:30:00 at 20800 rcf, 4 °C,
Transfer via Pasteur pipette the supernatant of each centrifuged sample to a new 2 mL tube for the analysis of non-polar molecules.
Add 1 mL of 80:20 Methanol:Water (MeOH:H 2 O) chilled to 4 °C to each tube containing (1) the remaining worm pellet and (2) zirconia beads.
Shake samples at 4 °C for 00:30:00
Centrifuge samples for 00:30:00 at 20800 rcf, 4 °C,
Transfer via Pasteur pipette the supernatant of each centrifuged sample to a new 2 mL tube for the analysis of polar molecules.
Place all non-polar extracts in a CentriVap at Room temperature and monitor until completely dry. CentriVap (Benchtop Centrifugal Vacuum Concentrator, Labconco, 7810010)
Place all polar extracts in a CentriVap at Room temperature and monitor until completely dry.
Remaining worm pellet and zirconia beads can be stored at -80 °C for future protein and/or carbohydrate analysis or discarded appropriately.
creator: Brianna M Garcia
